query:
CREATE TABLE `feedback` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`module` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`historyId` int,
	`rating` enum('satisfied','unsatisfied') NOT NULL,
	`comment` text,
	`contextJson` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `feedback_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

	`historyId` int,

	`comment` text,
	`contextJson` json,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `feedback_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
